messages.content: Build a drag-and-drop mouse stream in RxJS v7 using fromEvent with typed Point emissions (pointerdown starts, pointermove drags, pointerup ends).
Build an autocomplete pipeline in RxJS v7 that caches results with shareReplay and cancels stale queries via switchMap.
Build a reactive form state machine in RxJS v7 that merges field streams into a typed FormState with validation status.
Build a data refresh stream in RxJS v7 that refetches whenever the document becomes visible.
Build a throttled scroll handler in RxJS v7 using throttleTime to rate-limit scroll events to 100 ms bursts.
Build an observable-based state store in RxJS v7 using BehaviorSubject and a reducer pattern.
What's the v7 way to track drag offsets relative to the pointerdown origin? Show a minimal example.
What's the v7 way to add a request-level cache to a typeahead pipeline? Show a minimal example.
What's the v7 way to derive a reactive form's submit-enabled flag from its field streams? Show a minimal example.
What's the v7 way to refetch data whenever the window regains focus? Show a minimal example.
What's the v7 way to audit scroll events so only the latest value in a window emits? Show a minimal example.
What's the v7 way to expose a BehaviorSubject-backed store as a read-only Observable? Show a minimal example.
What's the v7 way to retry a failing observable with exponential backoff capped at 5 attempts? Show a minimal example.
What's the v7 way to throttle a scroll-based analytics ping to at most once per second? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how a drag-and-drop stream composes in RxJS v7, then show a typed implementation.
Explain briefly how an autocomplete cache works in RxJS v7, then show a typed implementation.
Explain briefly how a reactive form's validation stream composes in RxJS v7, then show a typed implementation.
Explain briefly how data-refresh-on-focus works in RxJS v7, then show a typed implementation.
Explain briefly how an observable-based state store with reducer semantics works in RxJS v7, then show a typed implementation.
Explain briefly how retry with exponential backoff works in RxJS v7, then show a typed implementation.
Write an RxJS v7 drag-and-drop stream that only fires while the left mouse button is pressed. Constraints: strict types, no any, and takeUntil on pointerup.
Write an RxJS v7 autocomplete that shares in-flight requests so concurrent identical queries don't fire twice. Constraints: shareReplay with refCount: true, switchMap, typed Observable.
Write an RxJS v7 form state machine with dirty/touched/valid flags. Constraints: BehaviorSubject per field, combineLatest object form, typed FormState.
Write an RxJS v7 data-refresh stream that refetches on visibility change AND on a manual refresh subject. Constraints: merge, startWith, switchMap, no any.
Write an RxJS v7 scroll handler that coalesces to at most one emission per frame. Constraints: auditTime(0, animationFrameScheduler), typed payload.
Write an RxJS v7 observable state store that supports selectors. Constraints: BehaviorSubject state, distinctUntilChanged per selector, typed store.
Write an RxJS v7 retry pipeline with jittered exponential backoff. Constraints: retry with delay callback, no retryWhen, capped delay 10s.

Add a pointer-cancel guard to this drag-and-drop stream: import { fromEvent, switchMap, takeUntil, map } from "rxjs"; const drag$ = fromEvent<PointerEvent>(el, "pointerdown").pipe(switchMap(() => move$.pipe(takeUntil(up$)))).

Add a minimum-length guard to this autocomplete pipeline: import { Subject, switchMap, debounceTime, of } from "rxjs"; const input$ = new Subject<string>(); const hits$ = input$.pipe(debounceTime(200), switchMap(q => of([q]))).

Add a submit-in-flight flag to this form state machine: import { BehaviorSubject, combineLatest, map } from "rxjs"; const email$ = new BehaviorSubject<string>(""); const state$ = combineLatest({email:email$}).pipe(map(({email})=>({email}))).

Add a cache-bust button observable to this focus-refresh stream: import { fromEvent, switchMap, startWith, of } from "rxjs"; const data$ = fromEvent(window, "focus").pipe(startWith(null), switchMap(()=>of({v:1}))).

Refactor this scroll handler to use auditTime instead of ad-hoc setTimeout: import { fromEvent } from "rxjs"; let t: number | null = null; fromEvent(window, "scroll").subscribe(() => { if (t) return; t = window.setTimeout(() => { t = null; console.log(window.scrollY); }, 100); });

Refactor this state store to expose a selector API and swap the raw BehaviorSubject for an asObservable boundary: import { BehaviorSubject } from "rxjs"; export const state$ = new BehaviorSubject<{n:number}>({n:0}); export function inc(){ state$.next({n:state$.getValue().n+1}); }

Fix this v6 retry-with-backoff to v7 idioms: import { throwError, timer } from "rxjs"; import { retryWhen, delayWhen } from "rxjs/operators"; throwError(() => new Error("x")).pipe(retryWhen(errors => errors.pipe(delayWhen((_e, i) => timer(2**i * 100)))));

Fix this autocomplete to use switchMap instead of mergeMap: import { Subject, mergeMap, of, debounceTime } from "rxjs"; const q$ = new Subject<string>(); const r$ = q$.pipe(debounceTime(200), mergeMap(s => of([s])));
Build a drag-selection rectangle stream in RxJS v7 that emits the current rect as the user drags.
Build a typed reactive form in RxJS v7 whose validation errors stream is separate from the value stream.
Build an RxJS v7 retry helper that accepts a retryable predicate and backs off exponentially.
Build an RxJS v7 scroll-driven infinite-load trigger that emits a bump when the user nears the bottom, rate-limited via auditTime.
